sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM users WHERE (status IN (#{cond.statuses}) AND id IN (#{cond.ids}) AND department_id IN (#{cond.deptIds}))
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status FROM users
<where>
    <if test="conditions != null and conditions.size() > 0">
        <foreach collection="conditions" item="cond" separator=" AND ">
            (<foreach collection="cond.statuses" item="s" separator="," open="status IN (" close=")">
                #{s}
            </foreach>
            AND id IN
            <foreach collection="cond.ids" item="id" separator="," open="(" close=")">
                #{id}
            </foreach>
            AND department_id IN
            <foreach collection="cond.deptIds" item="did" separator="," open="(" close=")">
                #{did}
            </foreach>)
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
